query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scan_history (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  scan_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'friday_sweep or daily_scan',
  ran_at BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'UTC ms timestamp',
  alert_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  accounts_scanned INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  triggered_by VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'auto' COMMENT 'auto or manual',
  summary_json TEXT COMMENT 'JSON array of alert summaries',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user_ran (user_id, ran_at DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scan_history (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  scan_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'friday_sweep or daily_scan',
  ran_at BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'UTC ms timestamp',
  alert_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  accounts_scanned INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  triggered_by VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'auto' COMMENT 'auto or manual',
  summary_json TEXT COMMENT 'JSON array of alert summaries',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user_ran (user_id, ran_at DESC)
);
